I have been feeling somewhat down . I am trying to be more productive and get things done . I am having trouble finding the energy and motivation . I can ' t type any more characters . I ' m pretty sure this is over 200 .

The last day has been much better than yesterday . Friends surprised with visit and we had a late night get together . My schedule at work changed to a more consistent schedule . What a relief ! This 200 character minimum is very frustrating .

Awake , aware and up early .   Having breakfast and going shopping .   No hangover at all .   I typically get up early every morning no matter what .   Drinking water all night helps with an issues from drinking

I’m feeling very relaxed and about to get ready for work at four today .   It’s taco Tuesday and should be busy , also ORG is surging which makes me happy as well .   I tried to nap before work but couldn’t due to my roommate coming home early from work .

Spending the night at work a d not drinking .   I’m serving plenty customers alcohol and having fun with them .   I’ll be here till 12 : 30 and then headed home to rest while a storm blows through town .   This has been entertaining to fill these surveys out .   I don’t know what else to say to fill my quota of words .

I have been tired , just getting my one day off to rest before going back to work . But also happy to be at home with my family and doing work around the house . It’s draining to only get one day to recoup after working 50 + hours .

Very tired , it’s allergy season so I am starting to get a cold . Plus i have been working about 60 + hours a week so it’s hard to get any good rest , especially with two kids waking me up early am . I am also driving two hours one way to work , so there’s a lot taking it’s toll on me .

Still the same as yesterday . Just getting sick from allergies and having to drive two hours to work . It’s been tough but I’m still doing it for my family . I’m looking forward to a few days off soon so I can do some work at home .

Feeling ok , again just very tiered from work . Plus it was hard to find gas today since everyone was hoarding it all so it was a long day all around . After another drive back home tonight I will be off for two days so looking forward to that .

Last day at work so it was a easier day since I’ll be off for two days . But a little stressed since it’s hard to find gas and when that will be fixed , also since I don’t know my schedule for next week .

It’s been two days off so I’m pretty good and finally getting some better rest . I have been able to get up with my kids in the morning which is extremely nice to get up and take them to school . It’s also nice not to have to drive 4 hours each day to get to work .

Up until now I have been in a fairly good mood . Got to sit down to work on financials for the family and do some yard work , but the impending doom of going back to work is weighing in . It’s not that I don’t like my “job” I just don’t like who I do it for .

I am currently feeling tired and sleepy , lack of sleep .   Had enough to socialize with friends . I also had lack of appetite . I work up today thinking it would be a good day but I soon realized my outlook was very pessimistic .

Woke up early than usual-6am ! It was a nice day out , so I went to FAC  and walked around .   Felt good about myself . No hangover and no headache .   I felt I had alot of energy to do alot of things in GPE  .

I ' m feeling great .   Went to work and socialized with co-workers . My boss even recognized my spirited personality today . Didn ' t even feel depressed or drained from work .   I felt emotionally stable .   I hope to feel this way tomorrow .

I ' m really feeling great . the beautiful weather puts me in a happy mood . I ' m able to go outside and enjoy the day instead of sitting in the house all day . I can take a walk in the park or just sit on my porch and enjoy the fresh air

as of right now I am feeling great .. enjoying the beautiful weather outside while drinking a nice cold lemonade . knowing summer is coming is making me more happy . now I can ' t wait till official summer comes .\ n

As of right now I am feeling good . I finally got done sleep last night . I’m more relaxed than usual . I had one drink last night and didn’t wake up feeling sluggish from it . Today so far has been a good day

As of right now I am clocking out of work and heading home . Today was a good day so I am feeling happy and relaxed . I will go home cooked and rest up for tomorrow . Well I will make sure to eat dinner first .

This is the time that I normally start getting ready to go to sleep . By this time I have already cooked dinner cleaned up showered myself and my kids and start getting ready to lay down . I am tired because I woke up early today

Today I woke up in a great mood . I was able to get enough sleep and I have a three day weekend coming up . So far work has been good and I hope it continues throughout the day . Time so far has been going pretty fast putting me in a better mood .

I am finally home from work and instead of having a two day weekend I am going to have a three day weekend . Today went very well at work and time went fast . I went to work in a great mood and left in a great mood . I am going to use this weekend to relax and recharge for Tuesday when I go back to work .

I started my three weekend off with a nice cold beer and it’s helping me just relax and watch tv . I I been just in a great mood watching movies and sipping and eating . So far I’ve had one but will probably drink two more

I feel a little sluggish . Last night I had about 3 mix drinks and steer not drinking for a while it did give me a little bit of a hangover . Hopefully after drinking time of water and taking advil the headache does go away ..

Today it’s raining and rain gets me in a sleep and calm mood .   I just want to lay down all day , relax and watch movies while having a cool pumpkin beer . I feel good today . And after drinking my beers I will feel more relaxed .

After having a couple of pumpkin Samuel Adams   beer I am definitely ready to lay down and go to bed . Normally if I drink towards the evening and I am at home instead of getting into party mode I get more into a relax sleepy mode . After drinking one more I am going to lay down and rest till tomorrow .

As of right now I can tired and feeling a bit lazy .   After having a couple of the beers last night I did wake up feeling a little more sleepy then I normally would .   Most likely after a small nap I’ll feel more energetic .

I am on my way to a party and before I left I took a nap so I feel great and I’m planning on having a couple of beers . Probably the same beers I had last night . I might be the only one drinking but I’m fine with that . I’m in a good mood .

After having a couple of drinks I am feeling pretty nice aka a little drunk . Definitely put me in a happy mood and I’m just sitting here listening to music and enjoying myself . I’ll probably have like two more and then head to bed .

Today I woke up feeling hungover . After having a couple drinks last night I didn’t drink water before I headed to bed causing me to wake up pretty hungover . There’s also a thunderstorm causing me to be more tired and lazy .

This morning I woke up hungover and lazy but now after taking a nap I feel much better . I been active cleaning up and doing laundry . I still fell a bit hungover but it’s not stopping me from moving around and getting my chores done .

First Day back to work after 3 days off and I need to still get more energy . I’m still in a chill mode and not fully awake and ready . I need to get use to walking up early again . Probably have a Red Bull to wake up .

It is the end of my work shift so I am in a great mood because I am so ready to go home . I have food ready for me to cook and I’m just going to cook clean up and then just relax . Beginning of my day I was more calm but now I am in a great mood .

I already prepared dinner cleaned up and took my kids a bath , So right now my body is tired and I’m ready to go to bed . Especially since the fact that I’ve been up since 6 AM by this time I normally get really tired . Also I was busy preparing everything for tomorrow morning so he caused me to be more tired .

Today is my Birthday so I woke up in a great mood . Work has been good so far and after work I will be going out for drinks so I’m even in a greater mood . I just been smiles all day . Hopefully today continues to go great for me .

As of right now I am in such a great mood . I have about 10 minutes till I have to clock out of work and I’m going to head home change my clothes and go out for a birthday dinner . While I’m at his birthday dinner I am going to have several margaritas to celebrate life .

I’m going expenses loss of income due to ORG open project the recent loss of my mother health issues and coping with that it’s hard when you have numerous things to do As I said before I am trying my best to exercise eat healthy and have a open mind sat

Today I am feeling anxious because I am trying to do something simple as set up a pole and every which way of ways I’m trying to make it right at keeps coming out horrible however I have to try my best until it’s done right I’m not give up

I’m feeling Happy anxiety overwhelmed all at once happens when I am waiting to hear an answer but being hopeful for some good news . Also thinking postally on the news I’m waiting on with good positive results and outcome for my future .

I am feeling energetic planning on attending the gym for a spin workout class . After the gym I am heading home to get ready to go to brunch with a bunch of friends . I’m very excited \ n about that .   Catching up and eating yummy food seems to be what excites me now on a Sunday
I’m getting ready to going to dinner with my boyfriend I’m hungry And excited to get dressed up and do my makeup .   Then we are meeting with friends for drinks in GPE   should be a fun evening
Tired ! had a nice meeting friends for dinner . Then I did some shopping at ORG for a new blender to do some smoothies for breakfast on the morning . I am feeling a little hopeful loosing some weight

I’m feeling very excited I started planning a fun birthday week . We are going to GPE  and GPE . I am excited to be planning outfits excursions and places to see and go . This will be my first time visiting both places

I’m feeling hungry . Getting dressed now to go to the grocery store . Tonight’s dinner will be lemon shrimp scampi .   After dinner we plan on watching a movie . I’m excited for dessert as well . Just looking forward to a relaxing Sunday doing pretty much nothing

I feel tired . I had a nice shrimp scampi dinner . Dinner was delicious . We watched reruns of tv shows after dinner .   For dessert we had special donuts with frosting . Today was a long day I am ready to go to bed and relax

I’m feeling energetic . I have a spin class later on this morning .   I am hoping I get some energy after the class .   I am going to go grocery shopping for the week after the class . I like to get everything out the way

I’m feeling hungry and tired .   I’m going to make myself a chicken salad bowl for dinner and I will prep for a few more days .   Once I’m going doing that I will take the dogs out for a walk . It’s still chilly out I look forward to warmer weather

Tired . I had a long day cooked dinner and went to the gym with a intense workout . I got a lot done today which makes me feel good I got a lot accomplished . I’m going to walk my dog and head to bed early tonight .

Not feeling well today .   I woke up to horrible stomach cramps , so today I will take An easy . During the day , because this evening we are going to a play to see pretty woman . I have not   seen this play before .

Excited I’m going with my boyfriend to see a broadway play tonight . This is my first time so I am very excited for that . First we are going to have dinner . My first time getting dressed up in a long time

I’m feeling active watching a broadway play . There is an intermission . I had a nice steak dinner earlier . I going home to bed , I am so tired from all the festivities today . I really enjoyed so far . Haven’t done things like since before covid .

I didn’t sleep well last night so I am feeling very tired this morning .   Once I feel better I am going to shower and get ready to clean the upstairs .   I need to accomplish something today to feel better about myself .

Feeling productive just got done cleaning the bathroom hopefully I can finish cleaning the upstairs fully spring cleaning .   Then I am cooking steak for dinner so I am excited for a yummy meal . I haven’t had steak in while so I’m already hungry for dinner .

I’m actively organizing my kitchen . From the spices to putting the plates in order and to make everything consistent . I’m getting new kitchen cabinets so I’m organizing everything until they come in .

Getting ready . Just got done doing my hair , I still have to do my makeup and find a outfit I actually like .   Meeting an old college friend I haven’t seen in 10 years for lunch .   I’m pretty excited about today .

Getting ready to cook dinner .   I placed an order to have the food delivered .   I am making salmon with rice and broccoli for dinner , with after dinner cocktails . Then excited to watch a movie later on tonight with a bunch of old friends .

I am so exhausted from the day I had . I meal prep and went to the gym and got an amazing workout in and after went shopping at the mall got summer clothes . I had a very active day . I am on chill mode and going to bed early .

I woke up not feeling well . Today I am I am feeling very lazy .   I am going to order food to be delivered . Even though I hate paying the extra fee to have delivered . After breakfast I will take a shower and just relax until I feel better and not push myself .

I’m really not doing to much right now . I’m still on bed not feeling well .   It sucks when you don’t feel good and you want to do things and you can’t . I will take an easy today and have a fresh start tomorrow . I’m going to take a bath hopefully I will feel better .

I am feeling a little better . My boyfriend is over he is making me homemade chicken soup , hopefully that makes me feel better .   Tomorrow I have my nieces birthday party u hope I am feeling better for that . The weather is a good so that is a good sign .

I am having a delicious breakfast with my best friend . I am having we are finally seeing each other .   After breakfast we are getting relaxing massages and heading to the nail salon . Fun relaxing girls day . It’s still cold so I will probably stay home tonight .

I’m currently waiting on triple a since my car battery’s died . The only plus to waiting around is that the weather is absolutely beautiful today . I think now we will be doing takeout for dinner versus cooking at home . Hopefully dinner is good then going home to relax .

I just got home from having dinner . I am so full and tired . I woke up extremely early this morning so I am definitely feeling exhausted now . So I am going to find a good movie and probably fall asleep pretty soon .

I am doing a full spring cleaning today i am doing one room at a time . You never realized how quickly dirt adds up . Once I get the full spring cleaning finished I am cleaning my closet .   Sort out the close and get rid of .

Currently watching a thriller movie . Today has been a chill day not doing too much . There is a lot I have to do today and I have not done much at all . Tomorrow is a new start to the week . We shall see .

Currently watching a movie . The movie is pretty long . It’s almost over as long as the movie was I truly enjoyed which I normally don’t watch movies . Thinking of going to the store for dessert after the movie .

I’m not really doing much right now . I just went and got myself a coffee , so I’m sitting down finishing it . After I’m don’s I may do a workout routine to keep myself busy . It’s raining today I will probably stay in .

Driving to the car lot to pick up my boyfriend’s car we’ll he is driving . his car broke down yesterday so it’s finally fixed . Heading to dinner after getting the card in the mood for something yummy . Thinking of getting NORP tonight .

Getting ready to take a shower .   I have to help my friend read scripts for her acting class later on tonight . Something I don’t like to do at all but I am being a great friend helping . Not sure what I am doing tomorrow .

I woke up late today . I am sitting around having a coffee . I am thinking of what I want to eat for breakfast today . I am trying to go the healthy route the next couple of weeks . I am trying to loose 15 pounds for my birthday in July . If I put my mind into it I can do it .

I’m cleaning at home . I’m trying to tackle one task at a time . I’m trying to do a very deep cleaning . It’s like you start one project and you go to the next . My boyfriend is making dinner tonight . I’m happy I don’t have to do that .

Just got down cooking dinner . I’m laying down relaxing .   I’m probably going to just watch a movie or show . I’m not really in the mood to do much tonight . Tomorrow I plan on doing some shopping for the house .

Getting ready to pick my friend up . I have to pick up my friend from the car lot and kill some time while she gets her car fixed . I am going to go to the outlets with her . Hopefully we find some good shopping finds . Then go out for lunch later .

Just got done shopping . I’m sitting in my car finishing a coffee from ORG .   I have ally more organizing to do at home probably do that . After my boyfriend is making baked chicken dinner sounds good .

Getting ready to take bath . I’m so tired I did slot of errands today . After that I will probably find a good movie and go to bed early . The robot vacuum is helping me clean . I’m thankful I don’t have to do that part of cleaning .

I’m reading different articles on a healthy cleanse something I can actually follow through on more than an hour . After doing this I am going for a run and then I will come home to get ready for work .

Just got done studying my new cleanse to see what I need to eat and drink and what I shouldn’t .   My boyfriend is making fish for dinner tonight . Today is day one of my cleanse and I feel great so far which is a good feeling to have starting something new .

Currently looking for a pair of sneakers online . Can’t decide on the kind or color I want to jog and do every day errands in . After this I will head upstairs and prep for tomorrow and get clothes ready .

I got dressed and ready for my run . I am currently having breakfast now . I think after breakfast and my run I will do some decor house shopping . I like to go to thrift stores also it’s just a long day digging to find goods .

I’m feeling energetic I went to the gym I did a couple miles this morning . I organized the bathroom closet . Now I am getting ready to prepare dinner . It’s also Friday so that makes me happy . Not sure what I am doing tonight yet . It’s also raining .

I am feeling happy . I went to a charity event today . It was a lot of fun and lots of funds were raised which makes me very happy . I am so tired I am looking forward to going to bed now . I am starting vacation next week it gives me something to look forward to .

I started boxing up clothing in my house to pack . I keep catching myself over pack things I no longer need . Many sentimental memories that are just hard to throw away priceless items . I am moving along though .

Just landed in GPE for vacation .   I am very happy to be in GPE although it looks like raining weather all week .   I look forward to working out outside and think nice walks on the beach .   The ocean is so beautiful here compared to back home :

I just arrived in LOC  GPE . Just had the most delicious steak dinner .   It came with sweet potato’s . I am very tired from flying all day . I am looking forward to getting a good nights sleep . I would like to go to the beach early .

I very happy on vacation mode .   Went for a five mike walk today . We walked to a wonderful breakfast place on the island . Soon we will be walking back up the hotel to enjoy the sun until the rain comes . There is a lot of rain showers .

I just went on a walk on the beach . Relaxing now . Figuring out what to do for lunch today . After lunch I most likely will take a nap I feel so tired but I am truly enjoying myself which is so important for my mind body and soul .

I am still enjoying vacation . Also today is my anniversary with my boyfriend . We just had the most amazing NORP dinner in LOC  . Looking forward to my pajamas and going to sleep Early again . The sun really tires you out .

I just had the most amazing breakfast . We had breakfast at the hotel we were going to walk a few miles . So we decided let’s have a convent morning and stay .   I am going to try getting less sun today before I have too much .

I’m having a aggravating day . But now I am going to relax in the pool . I had lunch a little while ago it was not the best lunch . The food was undercooked . I am looking forward to having a nice dinner . We are going to go later so we can enjoy more pool time .

I just had an amazing dinner again as the same restaurant as last night . It was that good we went back again . I’m tired the sun is very tiring . Tomorrow we are leaving in so said but it was fun . I look forward to coming back . Also getting sleep .

I woke up feeling tired and stressed thinking about my move . However I do look forward to decorating and starting new memories . It’s crazy to think a month from now I will be in a new home . Also I hope I find a home with a pool in it .

Getting dressed to go on a five mile walk . I am really starting to enough walking per day to enjoy it . I like walking to enjoy my dinner and what I am going to eat calories wise . It makes you think before having dessert and messing the diet up . It’s a hard battle to watch each day . I like the progress I have made .

Tonight is my friends birthday . There is about 20 of us celebrating dinner tonight .   Tonight I am eating dinner and dessert . There is such a big lay out . Food makes me so happy it makes me laugh . I look forward to laughs and good times .

Just had breakfast .   I am so tired for some reason today . I hate days like that where you want to do so much but you just don’t have the motivation . I’m looking forward to relaxing later on already and it’s only the morning right now . Maybe I will have a burst of energy .

I’m feeling happy and positive with moving into a new home . I bought some new linens today and candles . It’s a start for the new home . Today I am meeting my friends from college for dinner I haven’t seen in 10 years looking forward to the dinner later on .

Currently I am very relaxed . I am enjoying the pool and jacuzzi . Looking forward to watching the ORG  and ORG  football game . ORG  is ranked number five in the country while ORG  is number two in the country .

I am feeling totally relaxed this beautiful morning . I had a very restful sleep last night and woke up with a great start to the day . I am getting ready to go shopping at the outlets . I am looking for a new outfit for this evening with my friends .

I feel very happy . It’s a beautiful day , the sun is shining and I’m getting ready to have dinner with close friends . I haven’t seen them in awhile so there should be a lot of laughs . My cousin and his wife are coming as well . They recently had a baby girl .

Just relaxing . I’m sitting on my front porch waiting for my college friend to come over the house and join me in relaxing on this Labor Day weekend . It was a crazy summer but I still has a lot of fun . Not looking for to the winter .

I’m deciding what I want to make myself for breakfast . I woke up tired today . I couldn’t sleep well last night . I ended up watching a few shows . By the time I went to bed it was almost 1am . Today is Labor Day party .

I’m currently at a Labor Day party . Enjoying time with friends and family . Since GPE you really have to enjoy times like this . It’s all almost 100 degrees today . The pool feel like a bathtub . I am fortunate to be in a pool .

Just had an amazing dinner . We went to an NORP restaurant . I had chicken parmigiana with pasta . After dinner we had ice cream . It was really good . Tomorrow starts my diet so I ate what I wanted today . Tomorrow is a new day .

I   organizing my clothes for the work week . I like to be organized I feel like my mornings start off better if I am prepared . After that I am going to make pancakes for breakfast . That is something I never make . It will be nice for a change .

Today I am pretty aggravated dealing with my insurance company . I have serious mold issues in my condo and the insurance company is dragging their feet in attempting to resolve the issues . I have contacted my attorney to see what my rights are .

I am currently feeling relaxed . Finally . I had a hectic day dealing with the insurance company regarding the mold in my condo . I still need to touch base with them in the morning and try to get a resolution to the mold problem .

Quite " is an intensifier that means "really ," "completely ," "rather ," "exceptionally ," or "actually ". It ' s used to add strength to an adjective or adverb , but not as much as "really " or "very ". For example , "Blue jays are quite common in this area " means that blue jays are noticeably common , more common than you might expect . \n

Calm means free from agitation , excitement , or passion . Here are some ways to describe something as calm : 
 
Serene : A calm , peaceful , or tranquil state . When used to describe people , it can suggest dignity , composure , and graciousness . When used to describe nature , it can suggest mellowness .

Sadness is an emotion that can be described as a feeling of unhappiness , sorrow , or grief . It can also be characterized by feelings of loss , disappointment , helplessness , or despair . When someone is sad , they may withdraw from others , become lethargic or quiet , or cry

Feeling calm is a mental state of peace and quiet , free from agitation , excitement , or disturbance . It can also be described as a state of serenity , tranquility , or peace . When you feel calm , your body may experience the following physical changes : Lowered heart rate , Reduced blood pressure , Decreased feelings of anger and frustration \ n
Active , Awake , Mobile , Energetic , Agile

Feeling alive is a state of being that involves experiencing the full range of human emotions , including hopes , fears , and losses . It can also mean being present in the moment , and being fully engaged in the things you do

Feeling neutral is a calm , measured emotion that can mean feeling indifferent , nothing in particular , or a lack of preference . It can also mean being impartial , unbiased , or disinterested . Some say that feeling neutral can help you : Detach from a situation , See things more clearly , Think more creatively , Make better decisions , and Move forward \ n
